user.title: Configure Pollen Information
user.description: Enter your polleninformation.at API key and location to start receiving pollen forecasts. Data is provided by the Österreichischer Polleninformationsdienst (www.polleninformation.at).

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to polleninformation.at. Please check your internet connection.
error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key. Please request a valid key from polleninformation.at.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
